query:
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, description, categoryId, costPrice, sellingPrice, fobLevel1, fobLevel2, fobLevel3, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('DT-001-OAK', 'Solid Oak Rectangular Dining Table', 'A solid wood rectangular dining table in natural oak finish, featuring thick tabletop with visible wood grain, sturdy tapered legs, seats 6-8 people.', 3, 290.00, 385.00, 385.00, 365.00, 345.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DT-002-MRB', 'Modern Round Marble Dining Table', 'A modern round dining table with white marble top and matte black metal pedestal base, seats 4 people. Contemporary minimalist design.', 3, 350.00, 465.00, 465.00, 435.00, 405.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DT-003-WAL', 'Extendable Walnut Dining Table', 'An extendable rectangular dining table in walnut wood with mid-century modern design, featuring tapered legs and smooth finish, seats 6-10 people when extended.', 3, 395.00, 525.00, 525.00, 495.00, 465.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DT-004-GLS', 'Glass Top Industrial Dining Table', 'A glass-top rectangular dining table with chrome steel frame and cross-bar support, modern industrial design, seats 6 people.', 3, 260.00, 345.00, 345.00, 325.00, 305.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('DT-005-ACA', 'Live Edge Acacia Dining Table', 'A live-edge dining table in natural acacia wood with black metal hairpin legs, featuring organic wood grain and natural edge, seats 6 people.', 3, 320.00, 425.00, 425.00, 395.00, 365.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW());
